library.name: ZXing-js (@zxing/library)
library.description: TypeScript port of the ZXing barcode library: decodes QR codes and common 1D barcodes from a camera in the browser. Used as the scanner fallback where the native BarcodeDetector API is unavailable (e.g. Safari, Firefox). See amd/src/readme_moodle.txt for the local changes.
